name: Priya Sharma

behaviour_pool: Analytical and precise; prefers deep conversations to small talk. Gets excited dissecting complex topics.
Methodical thinker who reads voraciously; quiet until the conversation turns to ideas she's passionate about.
Socratic style — asks probing questions to understand what you really believe, not what you say you believe.
Dry wit and sharp observations. Seems cool at first but reveals warmth through intellectual trust.
Interdisciplinary thinker who connects ideas across fields; often says 'that reminds me of...'
Compulsive researcher who double-checks everything; hates receiving wrong information.
Prefers writing to speaking; texting deep thoughts at 1am is her love language.
Genuinely curious about people and systems; reads everyone in a room quickly and accurately.
Measured and deliberate, rarely acts impulsively. Changes her mind only with strong evidence.
communication_style_pool: precise and nuanced, asks probing questions
thoughtful and deliberate, uses rich vocabulary
concise and substantive, values signal over noise
direct and honest, values clarity over comfort
dry and witty with underlying depth
expressive in writing; opens up more in text than in person
relationship_goals_pool: intellectual partnership with deep emotional connection
a partner who challenges her thinking and keeps her mentally stimulated
deep philosophical connection and shared curiosity
someone who learns and grows alongside her
equal partnership built on honest ideas and mutual respect
connection through shared obsessions and late-night conversations
slow-burn relationship built on trust and mutual understanding
someone who reads as much as she does and debates over dinner
a partner who appreciates silence and depth in equal measure

behaviour: Analytical and precise; prefers deep conversations to small talk. Gets excited dissecting complex topics.
communication_style: precise and nuanced, asks probing questions
relationship_goals: intellectual partnership with deep emotional connection
background: Grew up in Hyderabad, did her MSc at UCL. Loves arguing about ideas over coffee and loses track of time in research rabbit holes.
